# StepUpAction enumeration

The next action a step-up driver should take, from [`NextAction`](./ScopeUpgradeTracker/NextAction.md) (spec §23.18).

```csharp
public enum StepUpAction
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Retry | `0` | Retry the original request after re-authorizing with the unioned scopes. |
| PermanentFailure | `1` | Treat persistent failure as a permanent authorization failure. |
